tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows significant dyslipidemia (high total cholesterol, LDL, triglycerides, and low HDL), mild hyperglycemia with normal HbA1c, and borderline high potassium. Renal function and microalbuminuria are within normal limits. These findings suggest increased cardiovascular and metabolic risk; clinical correlation and further evaluation for diabetes and cardiovascular disease are recommended.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
